_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.solve: blind solve grinds on this 2.5-degree field (narrow-field index scales); solve with the position hint: solve_field.py --ra=270.8 --dec=-23.9 --radius-deg=10 (the ASTAP complement in BACKLOG is the structural fix for narrow fields)
notes.spcc: sensor-null K R0.370/G0.912/B1.000 on 1862/5014 stars — the strong R down-scale is the L-Pro passband on an Ha-rich field; this chip (Sony IMX571) has a real profile in the SPCC database, the -oscsensor ladder is the C2 test case
notes.filters: no FILTER keywords in any header: filter identity is directory-only; flats/ and darkflats/ are per-set staging symlinks (flats_lpro, biases)
